name: football-performance-fund
description: Football Performance Fund clean production scaffold.

scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w database && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w database && npm run build -w backend
scripts.install:backend: npm ci && npm run build -w shared
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.test: npm run build -w shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w database && npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w database && npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
